title: Occultism KubeJS
description: Occultism KubeJS provides KubeJS integrations for Occultism.
body:
Occultism KubeJS provides KubeJS integrations for Occultism.

# Features

## Ritual Dummy Items

Enables the KubeJS ItemType "occultism:ritual_dummy", which allows creating ritual dummy items for custom rituals. Ritual dummies can be used to debug the ritual and act as a JEI integration to make rituals searchable.

## Recipe support 
Adds native support for occultism recipe types to KubeJS! You can now create custom Occultism recipes like in this example: https://github.com/klikli-dev/occultism-kubejs/blob/version/1.19/run/kubejs/server_scripts/example.js

I highly recommend using ProbeJS to see all the different things you can do to customise a ritual's input conditions!
